_comment: Canonical MCP connector triples for every routine in this repo. Auto-loaded by deploy.py. Add new entries here when wiring a new MCP into the routine fleet — deploy.py picks them up on next --create or --update. Only Jira (Atlassian) and the OrangeHRM BookStack wiki are inspected; the routine never fetches Google Drive / Docs bodies (URLs are kept as links inside the global User Interfaces (UIs) gallery at the bottom of the wiki page).
